items.title: Trust Incident Stabilization Sprint
items.description: A focused KTLO initiative to reduce critical production defects, tighten incident response loops, and remove the highest-severity reliability failures affecting General Listings Marketplace operations.

items.title: Marketplace Core Debt Retirement
items.description: A KTLO initiative to reduce operational drag by refactoring brittle integrations, simplifying recovery paths, and removing legacy technical debt that slows change in General Listings Marketplace.

items.title: Marketplace Security Patch Compliance Cycle
items.description: A KTLO initiative to keep the General Listings Marketplace stack within security patch SLAs by upgrading vulnerable dependencies, rotating outdated components, and closing remediation gaps.
